実際の mixi2 ドキュメントとは関係ありません
変更箇所: - hello メソッドに locale パラメータを追加 - Rate Limits の hello を 100/min から 200/min に変更 - Error Codes に 403 Forbidden を追加

# API Reference

## Overview

This document describes all available API methods.

## Methods

### `hello`

Send a greeting message.

```typescript
const result = await client.hello({
  name: 'world',
  locale: 'ja',
})
```

**Parameters:**

| Name     | Type     | Required | Description            |
| -------- | -------- | -------- | ---------------------- |
| `name`   | `string` | Yes      | Name to greet          |
| `locale` | `string` | No       | Locale for the message |

**Response:**

| Field     | Type     | Description          |
| --------- | -------- | -------------------- |
| `message` | `string` | The greeting message |

### `goodbye`

Send a farewell message.

```typescript
const result = await client.goodbye({
  name: 'world',
})
```

**Parameters:**

| Name   | Type     | Required | Description      |
| ------ | -------- | -------- | ---------------- |
| `name` | `string` | Yes      | Name to farewell |

## Rate Limits

| Method    | Limit   | Window   |
| --------- | ------- | -------- |
| `hello`   | 200/min | 1 minute |
| `goodbye` | 100/min | 1 minute |

## Error Codes

| Code | Description           |
| ---- | --------------------- |
| 400  | Bad Request           |
| 401  | Unauthorized          |
| 403  | Forbidden             |
| 429  | Too Many Requests     |
| 500  | Internal Server Error |
